nasb.text: Then they will sweep through like the wind and pass on. But they will be held guilty, They whose strength is their god.”

esv.text: Then they sweep by like the wind and go on, guilty men, whose own might is their god!”

cnv.text: 然後掃蕩如風吹過。 他們是有罪的，因他們以自己的勢力為神。

ccb.text: 他们如狂风横扫而过， 这些有罪的人把自己的力量奉为神明。”
